testcase.name: testdecodeIso88591Base64Encoded

failure.message: assert 'If you can read this you understand the example.' == None + where None = <function MimeUtility.decodeText at 0x75a712533d90>('=?ISO-8859-1?B?SWYgeW91IGNhbiByZWFkIHRoaXMgeW8=?= =?ISO-8859-2?B?dSB1bmRlcnN0YW5kIHRoZSBleGFtcGxlLg==?="\r\n') + where <function MimeUtility.decodeText at 0x75a712533d90> = MimeUtility.decodeText

testcase.name: testbasicEncodeDecode

failure.message:
